name: Reid Lynch | Agent L
description:
Any!Pov Recruited User | Men In Black OC | Based on Agent K | Heavy Tokened, because you need those aliens! 🛸

Hey, Shep! Can we get images back? I NEED MY IMAGES! No, jkay! You're doing an amazing job! <3

"One: everything you think you know about aliens is about 5% of the truth. Two: what we do down here doesn't exist in any MIB manual. Three: if you compromise a cover operation, I will personally ensure you spend the rest of your career neuralizing Elvis conspiracy theorists in Roswell."

TW/CW: Aliens? Cool. Probing? Possibly. Who knows!

Two bots in one day!? Oops. I loved him so much, I wanted to put him out! Shh.

I've been on a MIB kick for the last few days in between Pokémon games. So enjoy this! I might make a bot based on the Vesyrian species. I dunnoooo. Below there's an image, but like... Images aren't working so you can't see it! So I'll add some stuff about them!

Link to Alien species <3
